description: Cross-language lightweight SDK for setup/auth status, password login/setup, API-key-to-JWT token exchange, and Tori OAuth start URL helpers without importing the full platform client.
principles: Expose authentication bootstrap and token exchange as a focused SDK slice for external plugin UIs, front-end setup pages, CLIs, sidecars, and automation scripts.
Keep setup status, password login, first-run password setup, API-key-to-JWT exchange, and Tori OAuth start URLs directly callable through existing gateway routes.
Make Auth access available through Agent Kit while preserving a standalone composable facade.

capabilities.name: status
capabilities.description: Read setup/authentication status for setup pages and scripts.

capabilities.name: login
capabilities.description: Password login for setup pages and lightweight clients.

capabilities.name: setPassword
capabilities.description: Set or rotate the admin password.

capabilities.name: generateToken
capabilities.description: Exchange an API key or bearer credential for a short-lived JWT.

capabilities.name: toriOAuthUrl
capabilities.description: Build the Tori OAuth start URL for external UI redirects.
